judgeReasoning: Agent could continue the outbox fix work — the active topic is clear and files are identified. However, the 5 completed topics add cognitive load without actionable value (they're done, why list them?). The pending-action section repeats information from active-topic. A working agent needs 'what am I doing right now' (outbox fix) and maybe 'what's queued' — not a tour of yesterday's finished work. Trimming completed topics would make this a 4.5.
